pokemon:phantump.name: Phantump
pokemon:phantump.summary: According to old tales, these Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died while lost in the forest.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: According to old tales, these Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died while lost in the forest.
According to legend, medicine to cure any illness can be made by plucking the green leaves on its head, brewing them, and boiling down the liquid.
These Pokémon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests.
With a voice like a human child’s, it cries out to lure adults deep into the forest, getting them lost among the trees.
These Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died in the forest. Their cries sound like eerie screams.
After a lost child perished in the forest, their spirit possessed a tree stump, causing the spirit’s rebirth as this Pokémon.
An unknown spirit came to lodge in a tree stump, creating this Pokémon. A cure-all can be made from an infusion of its green leaves.
By imitating the voice of a child, it causes people to get hopelessly lost deep in the forest. It’s trying to make friends with them.
These Pokémon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests.
According to old tales, these Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died while lost in the forest.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: According to old tales, these Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died while lost in the forest.

pokemon:trevenant.name: Trevenant
pokemon:trevenant.summary: Using its roots as a nervous system, it controls the trees in the forest. It’s kind to the Pokémon that reside in its body.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Using its roots as a nervous system, it controls the trees in the forest. It’s kind to the Pokémon that reside in its body.
Through its roots, it exerts control over other trees. A deadly curse falls upon anyone cutting down trees in forests where Trevenant dwell.
It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.
Small roots that extend from the tips of this Pokémon’s feet can tie into the trees of the forest and give Trevenant control over them.
This Pokémon is said to devour anyone daring to ravage the forest. To the creatures dwelling in the forest, it offers great kindness.
People fear it due to a belief that it devours any who try to cut down trees in its forest, but to the Pokémon it shares its woods with, it’s kind.
This Pokémon controls trees via roots stretching from its feet, and it will attack anyone that dares to ravage the forest.
It’s feared as a ghost of the forest. Lumberjacks bring along Fire types, which Trevenant hates, when they enter the forest.
It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.
Using its roots as a nervous system, it controls the trees in the forest. It’s kind to the Pokémon that reside in its body.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Using its roots as a nervous system, it controls the trees in the forest. It’s kind to the Pokémon that reside in its body.
